product: Convert to Unity Catalog managed table from external table
tagline: SET MANAGED command is now generally available.
what_it_does: SET MANAGED command is now generally available. This command seamlessly converts Unity Catalog external tables to managed tables. It allows you to take full advantage of Unity Catalog managed table features, such as enhanced governance, reliability, and performance.
why_it_matters: It allows you to take full advantage of Unity Catalog managed table features, such as enhanced governance, reliability, and performance.
plain_summary: SET MANAGED command is now generally available. This command seamlessly converts Unity Catalog external tables to managed tables.
